title: Jon Cozart: Laughter Ever After
full_description: Jon Cozart — YouTube sensation behind the 46-million-viewed After Ever After Disney parody and Harry Potter in 99 Seconds — brings his one-man show to Edinburgh Fringe. Performed at Underbelly Med Quad, the show blends technology, music, and comedy: behind him, four screens show his classic YouTube videos and provide harmonies with pre-recorded versions of himself, while live he sings his musical parodies and tells the story of how an internet kid becomes a live performer. 'A voice to die for... a natural storyteller' (The Wee Review).
ai_summary: Jon Cozart's Edinburgh Fringe debut — the YouTube creator behind the 46-million-view After Ever After brings his musical comedy show to a stage, singing a cappella parodies with himself on four screens behind him and telling the story of how a YouTube channel becomes a real career.
